# Coldwater Labs

> Done-for-you websites for local home-service businesses (plumbing, HVAC, cleaning, roofing, lawn care). One flat fee, you own it, no monthly. Built to be found on Google and proven with Google PageSpeed scores before and after. Based in Germantown, TN; serves the United States.

## What we do
- Build a professional, mobile-first, conversion-focused website for a local service business — phone-first, customer reviews, a 3-field contact form, and clean structure Google (and AI search) can read.
- Deliver it as an asset the owner fully owns: all files and logins transfer on final payment. No retainers, no monthly management.
- Prove the upgrade objectively with Google's own PageSpeed score, before vs. after.

## Pricing
- Website — $697: one-page conversion site built to our build standard, AI-search-ready under the hood, full ownership.
- Website + Local Visibility — $997: everything above plus a full Google Business Profile build/optimization, NAP cleanup, on-site SEO + Search Console submit, and lead-to-text.
- A-la-carte post-delivery changes: Small $47 · Medium $147 · Big $297 · 3-bundle $247 · 5-bundle $397.

## How we work
- Outbound: we find the prospect and build a finished demo first.
- One flat fee, 50% deposit to start, balance at sign-off before go-live. Live in 7–10 business days.
- A real person, not an agency or a call center.

## What we do not do
- No monthly retainers, no recurring SEO service, no fake reviews, and no guarantees of specific ranking or call volume. We prove what is provable (PageSpeed) and build the rest honestly.

## Contact
